storyboard.content: I've been feeling extremely tired and weak for the past month, more than I've ever felt before.
My skin has been looking very pale and my friends have commented on it too.
I get short of breath doing simple activities like walking up stairs.
I've been having headaches and feeling dizzy when I stand up.
The fatigue has been building up progressively over the past month.
The tiredness is significantly affecting my daily life and I can't do things I normally do.
I'm a 38-year-old woman with a history of heavy menstrual periods.
